PackList.title: Cursed Mirror
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve exact facial structure, eye shape, eye color, eyebrows, nose, lips, jawline, chin, skin texture, facial proportions.

Photorealistic, cinematic medium shot of a man in a dark suit and white dress shirt looking into an ornate, oval antique brass mirror in a dimly lit, atmospheric room. The man's reflection is a decaying, ghastly version of himself with sunken, skeletal facial features, translucent pale skin showing dark veins, an open-mouthed silent scream, and intensely glowing solid blue eyes. The real man is seen from the back, shoulder-on, out of focus. Lighting is moody and low-key, featuring warm candlelight from a single candle in the foreground and two in the background, contrasting with a cold, foggy blue ambient light filling the mirror's reflection. Captured on Arri Alexa, 35mm lens, f/2.8, with shallow depth of field. The skin texture is hyper-realistic and forensic, showing visible pores, fine stubble, natural skin imperfections, and micro-sweat without any smoothing. The background contains tangled, dry vines and a stone wall obscured by thick, volumetric fog. High-contrast, sharp details, 8k resolution, natural film grain.
